items.name_cn:
MULTI POCHETTE M44813#Uninspected Version#
▪️Size: 24*13.5*4cm▪️
Classic Monogram material paired with color-changing leather, multiple compartments. Known as a '3-in-1' bag with versatile usage, it's a styling essential. The chain can be removed to use as a small bag. We use original factory leather materials, exuding a full-screen ZP visual effect from any angle!

specs.rawTitle:

▪️Size: 24*13.5*4cm▪️

items.name_en: Multi-color available🌟🌟🌟 Large H real photos🔮🔮🔮 OHANEL🚩🚩🚩 25B heavyweight contender, don't blink😉, small bucket bag, instantly falling for the fairy-like cream white. Classic quilted stitching + mini double C logo, low-key and classy.· Pull the drawstring to instantly become a "🤩🤩 little lucky bag", full of anti-theft skills.· The chain ⛓️ length can be shoulder, crossbody, or slung casually, friendly for petite frames. Instantly photogenic with a Southern France vacation vibe! This one is on the "heirloom" list, sisters waiting for 25B, go for it! The elegance of the quilted pattern, the embellishment of the gold chain, this black handbag is simply too high-end. Large and small pocket design, practical and stylish, paired with gold metal ring details, texture maxed out~ Light luxury style! 4775 Dimensions: 12.5×10×7cm

Top-tier Original This Dopp Kit wash bag is made from Monogram Eclipse canvas, offering a subtle choice for Monogram enthusiasts. It offers ample space for travel essentials, with double zippers for security and a wide opening for easy access. 28.0 x 15.0 x 16.5 cm (Length x Height x Width)
	•	Monogram Eclipse Coated Canvas
	•	Washable Fabric Lining
	•	Metal Hardware
	•	Double Zipper Closure with Magnetic Snap Cover
	•	Ample Capacity
	•	Wide Opening
